query:
SELECT configKey, configValue, LENGTH(configValue) as len, updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_TEST_MODE')
ORDER BY configKey;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, configValue, LENGTH(configValue) as len, updatedAt
FROM platform_config 
WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID','TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN','TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID','TWILIO_TEST_MODE')
ORDER BY configKey;
